senses.gloss: to describe, to characterize, to bewrite

examples.text: وَنَعَتَنِي بِأَلْفَاظٍ غَيْرِ لَائِقَةٍ، كَانَ فِي حَالةِ هِيَاجٍ جُنُونِيَّةٍ وَٱلشَرَرِ يُقْدَحُ مِن عَيْنَيْهِ، […]
examples.english: And he called me unseemly epithets, in a frantic state of commotion, sparks firing from his eyes.

senses.gloss: to attributize, to qualify, to epithetize
